requirement_topic.en: Hungary MAVIR / MEKH Grid-Connection Review — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 230/400 V 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 匈牙利MAVIR/MEKH并网审查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: 匈牙利MAVIR/MEKH併網審查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz參數

summary.en: Grid-connected solar PV inverters in Hungary are subject to MAVIR (Magyar Villamosenergia-ipari Átviteli Rendszerirányító Zrt.) technical requirements at transmission level and DSO grid-connection technical requirements at distribution level, under MEKH (Magyar Energetikai és Közmű-szabályozási Hivatal) regulatory oversight. The practical IEC evidence package normally includes IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface compliance, with firmware protection thresholds, reconnection delay, voltage windows, and frequency windows validated for Hungary's 230/400 V, 50 Hz low-voltage grid. Hungary uses the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but the nominal voltage differs: Hungary is 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase, while China is 220/380 V under GB/T 156. The EU RfG Regulation (2016/631) applies to power-generating modules above thresholds set by Hungary. Grid-connection applications to MAVIR and DSOs must be submitted in Hungarian.
summary.zh: 匈牙利并网太阳能光伏逆变器须接受MAVIR（Magyar Villamosenergia-ipari Átviteli Rendszerirányító Zrt.）在输电层级的技术审查，以及配电系统运营商在配电层级的并网技术要求审查，均在MEKH（Magyar Energetikai és Közmű-szabályozási Hivatal）监管下进行。实际IEC证据包通常包括IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口合规，并须针对匈牙利230/400 V、50 Hz低压电网验证固件保护阈值、重连延迟、电压窗口和频率窗口。匈牙利与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压不同：匈牙利为单相230 V、三相400 V，而中国依据GB/T 156为220/380 V。欧盟RfG法规（2016/631）适用于超过匈牙利设定阈值的发电模块。向MAVIR及配电系统运营商提交的并网申请须以匈牙利语进行。
summary.zht: 匈牙利併網太陽能光伏逆變器須接受MAVIR（Magyar Villamosenergia-ipari Átviteli Rendszerirányító Zrt.）在輸電層級的技術審查，以及配電系統運營商在配電層級的併網技術要求審查，均在MEKH（Magyar Energetikai és Közmű-szabályozási Hivatal）監管下進行。實際IEC證據包通常包括IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面合規，並須針對匈牙利230/400 V、50 Hz低壓電網驗證韌體保護閾值、重連延遲、電壓窗口和頻率窗口。匈牙利與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓不同：匈牙利為單相230 V、三相400 V，而中國依據GB/T 156為220/380 V。歐盟RfG法規（2016/631）適用於超過匈牙利設定閾值的發電模組。向MAVIR及配電系統運營商提交的併網申請須以匈牙利語進行。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
MAVIR Hálózati Csatlakozási Szabályzat (HCSZ) — Hungarian grid connection technical requirements
MEKH electricity-sector approval and oversight requirements
Hungary low-voltage grid context — 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power station connection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These documents are built around China grid conditions and domestic acceptance procedures. China's low-voltage baseline is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, not Hungary's 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Chinese grid certificates and factory firmware settings do not automatically transfer to MAVIR/DSO acceptance or MEKH project review in Hungary.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求及国内防孤岛测试结果。这些文件以中国电网条件和国内验收流程为基础。中国低压基准为50 Hz、220/380 V，而非匈牙利50 Hz、230/400 V。中国并网证书和出厂固件设置不能自动转移为MAVIR/配电系统运营商认可或MEKH项目审查证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求及國內防孤島測試結果。這些文件以中國電網條件和國內驗收流程為基礎。中國低壓基準為50 Hz、220/380 V，而非匈牙利50 Hz、230/400 V。中國併網證書和出廠韌體設置不能自動轉移為MAVIR/配電系統運營商認可或MEKH項目審查證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid-connection evidence is not a substitute for Hungarian MAVIR/MEKH project acceptance. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, a Hungary-specific settings file, and commissioning records for 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Do not describe Hungary voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V. MAVIR and DSO grid-connection applications must be submitted in Hungarian; technical documentation summaries in Hungarian are typically expected. The EU RfG Regulation (2016/631) adds binding frequency response, reactive power, and fault ride-through requirements not present in Chinese domestic grid codes.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网证据不能替代匈牙利MAVIR/MEKH项目验收。出口商应准备IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、匈牙利专用设置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz调试记录。不得称匈牙利电压与中国相同：仅50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V。MAVIR及配电系统运营商并网申请须以匈牙利语提交；技术文件摘要通常须以匈牙利语提供。欧盟RfG法规（2016/631）增加了中国国内电网规程中没有的强制性频率响应、无功功率和故障穿越要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網證據不能替代匈牙利MAVIR/MEKH項目驗收。出口商應準備IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、匈牙利專用設置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz調試記錄。不得稱匈牙利電壓與中國相同：僅50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V。MAVIR及配電系統運營商併網申請須以匈牙利語提交；技術文件摘要通常須以匈牙利語提供。歐盟RfG法規（2016/631）增加了中國國內電網規程中沒有的強制性頻率響應、無功功率和故障穿越要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected projects through MAVIR technical review and MEKH-regulated DSO project acceptance; EU RfG 2016/631 is binding EU law in Hungary; grid-connection applications must be in Hungarian
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid acceptance only and is not a MAVIR/MEKH approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for Hungary 230/400 V

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not automatically satisfy Hungarian MAVIR/MEKH grid-connection review. Prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, re-parameterise inverter firmware for Hungary's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid, confirm EU RfG (2016/631) frequency-response and reactive-power capability, and submit grid-connection applications in Hungarian. Verify current MAVIR HCSZ and DSO requirements directly before shipment or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T并网文件不能自动满足匈牙利MAVIR/MEKH并网审查。请准备IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，将逆变器固件重新参数化为匈牙利230/400 V、50 Hz电网，确认符合欧盟RfG（2016/631）频率响应和无功功率能力要求，并以匈牙利语提交并网申请。出货或调试前请直接核实现行MAVIR HCSZ及配电系统运营商要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T併網文件不能自動滿足匈牙利MAVIR/MEKH併網審查。請準備IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，將逆變器韌體重新參數化為匈牙利230/400 V、50 Hz電網，確認符合歐盟RfG（2016/631）頻率響應和無功功率能力要求，並以匈牙利語提交併網申請。出貨或調試前請直接核實現行MAVIR HCSZ及配電系統運營商要求。
